findings.current: html element must have a lang attribute
Lists must only contain li elements

fixes.description: Set the document language with a valid lang attribute on the html element.
assisted_steps: Identify the affected DOM node and confirm the semantic role expected by WCAG.
Apply a minimal structural change that preserves existing behavior and layout.
Re-run scanner checks and validate keyboard/screen-reader behavior manually.
verification_rules: The finding no longer appears in scanner output for the modified target.
Keyboard navigation and focus order remain functional after the change.

framework_hints.html: Use semantic HTML and explicit accessible names.
framework_hints.react: Set lang on the root html template emitted by your React app shell.
framework_hints.vue: Set lang on the root html element in Vue entry templates or SSR shell.
framework_hints.nextjs: Set lang on <Html> in _document or app router root layout html element.

fixes.description: Add a meaningful alt attribute or mark decorative images with empty alt text.
assisted_steps: Identify the affected DOM node and confirm the semantic role expected by WCAG.
Apply a minimal structural change that preserves existing behavior and layout.
Re-run scanner checks and validate keyboard/screen-reader behavior manually.
verification_rules: The finding no longer appears in scanner output for the modified target.
Keyboard navigation and focus order remain functional after the change.

framework_hints.html: Use semantic HTML and explicit accessible names.
framework_hints.react: In JSX, ensure every has an explicit alt prop; keep icon-only media as alt="".
framework_hints.vue: In Vue templates, provide alt or :alt bindings for each img element.
framework_hints.nextjs: For next/image, require alt on every <Image> usage and keep decorative media alt="".

fixes.description: Ensure list containers contain only listitem children.
assisted_steps: Identify the affected DOM node and confirm the semantic role expected by WCAG.
Apply a minimal structural change that preserves existing behavior and layout.
Re-run scanner checks and validate keyboard/screen-reader behavior manually.
verification_rules: The finding no longer appears in scanner output for the modified target.
Keyboard navigation and focus order remain functional after the change.

framework_hints.html: Use semantic HTML and explicit accessible names.
framework_hints.react: Prefer semantic JSX and explicit aria/label props.
framework_hints.vue: Bind semantic attributes explicitly in templates.
framework_hints.nextjs: Preserve semantic output after server/client rendering.

change_summary.recommended_action: Set the document language with a valid lang attribute on the html element.
Add a meaningful alt attribute or mark decorative images with empty alt text.
Ensure list containers contain only listitem children.
